metadata.instruction: Set DuckDuckGo as the default search engine on Chrome
metadata.context: I prefer a privacy-focused search engine and want to use DuckDuckGo by default.

l3.rationale: Modifier press while JAWS list item is focused.

l4.rationale: Switched focus in the desktop/app environment from Program Manager toward the active window.

l5.rationale: Uses application and web navigation to reach the settings area, then selects existing search text and clears it to prepare for a new query.
